programmes.t: On The Case With Paula Zahn

programmes.t: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
programmes.d: After years apart, Jamie-Lee reunites with her father, Isakin, the Skara Cannibal, to confront him on the infamous, brutal murder of his girlfriend.
When 18-year-old Julie Heath goes missing in rural Arkansas, the small town begins a desperate search for her. But no one expects the horror that ensues.
A serial killer is on the loose and slaughtering the homeless population in California. Investigators face a desperate race against time to unravel the case.
College student Bryce is driving to visit his parents, but his car is later found crashed and abandoned in a remote California park. What happened to him?
Orinda has been voted one of Americas friendliest towns. But when one familys war turns deadly, the shocking revelations will stun the entire nation.
Beaver Dams, New York is home to one very unconventional family. When someone decides to introduce murder to the family, police find there is no lack of suspects.

programmes.t: On The Case With Paula Zahn
programmes.d: Police wonder if a young womans personalised license plate, FLRT 12, makes her the target for murder or if a more sinister plot is behind the crime.

A 5-year-olds death in hospital seems to be a tragedy, but doctors soon suspect his mother is involved. Police uncover a horrific truth.
Single father of four Richard Mannion always follows his heart. But when he is found shot dead in his home, police suspect he sought out love in all the wrong places.

When Candace Hiltz is killed in Prison Valley, police pursue her troubled brother. With no evidence, the case goes cold - until a storage unit offers clues.
When Lea Porter vanishes in Prison Valley her family turn detective to try and find her. Their investigation leads to a shocking discovery.
When a nine-year-old child disappears from an amusement park in Long Island, New York, the race is on to stop a dangerous child abductor.
When a team of firefighters extinguish a burning truck, they reveal the charred remains of a human corpse inside. Detectives delve into the truth behind the crime.

programmes.t: I Almost Got Away With It
programmes.d: Two men become fugitives from the law, including Howard Brown who masterminds a daring ruse to elude authorities. How long before justice catches up with them?
At Christmas, 1989, the Harris family is killed in New York. Just as things seem normal again, the horror returns. And a curse lasts for ten years.
In February 1990, the Dryden community searches for a missing little girl. Three years later, the curse returns when a love triangle turns to murder.
52-year-old Cole Cannon was found dead in his trailer when it caught fire in Lawrence County, Alabama. Coles children discuss their search for the truth.
When Misook falls in love with Don, she gets a husband and a mother in law she adores in Linda. But love turns to violence and its Linda who is caught in the middle.
Explore stories that might have been lifted from the plot of a horror movie. Yet these shocking tales are in fact real, and they show just how far some evil in-laws will go.
